title: Canonical Standalone Narrative (CSN) Object
description: Canonical Standalone Narrative (CSN) object. Immutable post-mint. Time-participating (timestampContext present but excluded from fingerprint). Fingerprint: CSN_FINGERPRINT_V1 per SANTA v1.0. permanence field does not exist (Option B ruling).

laneType.description: Lane type identifier — must be NARRATIVE

id.description: Canonical standalone narrative ID — content-derived SHA256 hash (CSN_FINGERPRINT_V1)

eventType.description: Event type — must be CSN (Canonical Standalone Narrative)

subclass.description: Subclass assigned by NCA — fingerprint-participating field

eventDescription.description: Neutral declarative event description — not in fingerprint

timestampContext.description: Precise time marker — not in fingerprint
